prose: The Fukui reactivity estimation was performed using chemkit with the DFT method at B3LYP/def2-TZVP level in the gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The result provided a quantitative measure of the local reactivity indices, notably indicating the most electrophilic site on atom 3 (C) and the most nucleophilic site on atom 1 (O). The calculation converged with some warnings about charge conservation drift, but the results are trustworthy.
